creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to lbartoletti from comment #3)

Hi Loïc,
Thanks for the report. And sorry for the late answer, I am really busy, at work and in private life :(

Unfortunately, I never saw this type of error before on my own QGIS installations. Could you please give some more details? For example, when exactly does this error occur (during program start, while using an extension, ...).

Could you also try to rename ~/.qgis2 to ~/.qgis2_BAK and ~/.config/QGIS to ~/.config/QGIS_BAK, like mentioned in comment #1?
